name: High Temptation Target Changed to Lower Temptation
notes: This rule triggers when a high temptation target has decreased to medium or low temptation.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Attack Surface Management
when the event matches Temptation (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches Temptation (custom) is less than or equal to 29
when any of Target ID (custom) are contained in any of High Temptation Target - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY High Temptation Target Changed to Lower Temptation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Attack Surface Management
AND when the event matches Temptation (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches Temptation (custom) is less than or equal to 29
AND when any of Target ID (custom) are contained in any of High Temptation Target - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Remove "Target ID" from Reference Set: "High Temptation Target"
